untranslatable_reason: Signal requires direct interest rate data (interest rate levels, moving averages of rates, rate differentials, and rate regime detection) which are NOT available in the provided indicator list. The signal is fundamentally based on macro interest rate regime analysis, not price-based technical indicators. No proxy from price/volume/volatility indicators can accurately replicate interest rate sensitivity for options positions.
translation_notes: This signal cannot be properly translated because it requires an external interest rate feed or interest rate-derived indicators (IR_level, IR_MA, IR_diff, etc.) that do not exist in the allowed indicator set. The core logic—adjusting call/put ratios based on rate regime—cannot be expressed using only price, volume, and derived price-based indicators. A valid backtest would need interest rate data integrated into the engine.
